articles.title: The Download: climate tech goes public and the AI Hype Index returns
articles.summary: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Climate tech companies are going public. What’s next? Solar and battery company Solv Energy went public in February, hitting a $6 billion valuation. X-energy, which builds small modular nuclear reactors, followed…

articles.title: DAVIDsTEA Inc. (DTEAF) Q1 2027 Earnings Call Prepared Remarks Transcript
Climate tech companies are going public. What’s next?
articles.summary: This year, there’s been a wave of notable energy companies going public via IPO in the US. The solar and battery company Solv Energy went public in February, to the tune of $6 billion. X-energy, which is building small modular nuclear reactors, did the same in April, and its stocks surged on its first day…
